non_inert_proof.method: Mutation: commented out `await consumer.start()` in beforeAll; ran isolated wiring test
non_inert_proof.dev_env_finding: In THIS dev environment, a background stream-worker main.ts process (PID 951) is running with the production `live-ledger-bridge` consumer group. This process consumed the test events and wrote ledger rows, making TW1/TW2 pass even without the test's own consumer started.
non_inert_proof.ci_validity: In CI (no background main.ts), commenting out consumer.start() WOULD cause TW1/TW2 to timeout → RED — matching the original ORCH-LV-H1 failure mode exactly.
non_inert_proof.verdict: CONDITIONAL — test is structurally non-inert in CI; dev environment has background process that masks mutation. Test structure is correct for CI. QA notes this environment condition.
